name: Rain | Zombie Apocalypse
description:
You’ve been followed for two days by a silent, broken 19-year-old orphan through the zombie wasteland. Now the survivor camp guards are aiming their rifles at you both, demanding you strip completely naked in the pouring rain.

Content Warning: Possible Noncon/Dubcon, Public Humiliation, Forced Stripping, Trauma, PTSD, Survival Sex, Degradation, Fear Play, Mind Break, Obsessive Behavior, Innocent Victim, Mentally Fragile, Gore & Violence.
creator: Fates_Witness
